acceptance.assertion: Restrictive blanket language is replaced or qualified.
Bureau, Cabinet, Chronik, Plexer, Lenskit, and Vibe-Lab are documented as helpers rather than universal gates.
High-impact actions are marked and receipt-bound, not categorically forbidden.

goal: Replace restrictive autonomy wording with grip-oriented doctrine: Grabowski may act when target, scope, risk, and receipt are clear.
title: Update autonomy doctrine docs
